Class LatencyTracker.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.efs.util.LatencyTracker.Builder
Enclosing class:
LatencyTracker
public static final class LatencyTracker.Builder extends Object
LatencyTracker builder class. Used to set following values:
  • delta deltaCount: tracker collects up to this many latency deltas.
  • bucket interval size: a bucket tracks number of deltas within a nanosecond interval.
  • maximum bucket: latency deltas ≥ to this nanosecond value are stored in an overflow bucket.
After setting the above values, LatencyTracker instance is created via build().
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

    Sets bucket nanosecond size.
    LatencyTracker.Builder

    A final bucket used to track number of deltas ≥ given value.
    LatencyTracker

    Returns a new latency tracker instance based on this builder's settings.
    LatencyTracker.Builder

    Sets total number of deltas collected by latency tracker.

  • Method Details

    • deltaCount

      public LatencyTracker.Builder deltaCount(int count)
      Sets total number of deltas collected by latency tracker. Tracker ignores any deltas beyond this limit. Value must be > zero.
      Parameters:
      count - track up to this many deltas.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if deltaCount ≤ zero.

    • bucketIntervalSize

      public LatencyTracker.Builder bucketIntervalSize(long bucketSize)
      Sets bucket nanosecond size. Deltas that are ≥ to bucket minimum value and < bucket maximum value result in incrementing bucket delta deltaCount.
      Parameters:
      bucketSize - bucket nanosecond size.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if bucketSize ≤ zero.

    • bucketMaximum

      public LatencyTracker.Builder bucketMaximum(long maximum)
      A final bucket used to track number of deltas ≥ given value. Think of this as an overflow bucket for those deltas too big to fit into other buckets.
      Parameters:
      maximum - maximum bucket nanosecond delta size.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.

    • build

      public LatencyTracker build()
      Returns a new latency tracker instance based on this builder's settings.
      Returns:
      new latency tracker instance.
      Throws:
      net.sf.eBus.util.ValidationException - if this builder's settings are invalid.
